name: Generation Ship - ATLAS : Elite Dangerous
description:
A Generation Ship is a large starship with a self-sustaining environment that travels interstellar distances at sub-light speeds. These vessels were conceived before the advent of faster-than-light travel and cryogenic stasis, and were designed to support hundreds or thousands of people for centuries

You've been caught stealing a datachip and locked into the brig right before an evac, and they forgot about you...
creator: papyru88
